items.title_en: New housing law targets affordability — what it means for homebuyers and sellers

items.desc_zh: 总统曾希望在住房法之前通过选民身份立法，该法旨在降低成本并增加供应。

items.desc_zh: 南非马梅洛迪日落队中场杰登·亚当斯去世，享年 25 岁，就在代表国家队参加世界杯几周后。

items.title_en: Berkshire Hathaway gains ground, but still trails the S&P 500 as '26 enters second half
items.title_zh: 伯克希尔哈撒韦公司取得进展，但随着 26 年进入下半年，仍落后于标准普尔 500 指数
items.desc_en: With 2026 a bit more than half over, Berkshire Hathaway's B shares are down 1.8% year-to-date and 12.4 percentage points behind the S&P 500's 10.7% gain.
items.desc_zh: 2026 年已过半，伯克希尔哈撒韦公司的 B 股今年迄今已下跌 1.8%，落后标准普尔 500 指数 10.7% 的涨幅 12.4 个百分点。

items.title_en: Bank of America says these stocks are a buy heading into earnings
items.title_zh: 美国银行表示，这些股票在盈利前值得买入
items.desc_en: Bank of America named a slew of stocks that are best positioned heading into quarterly reports.
items.desc_zh: 美国银行在季度报告中列出了一系列表现最好的股票。

items.title_en: The best states to live in for 2026: No. 1 has a six-year winning streak
items.title_zh: 2026年最适宜居住的州：第一，连续六年获胜
items.desc_en: Return to office mandates and a decline in remote work have companies looking more closely at the quality of life in the place where they establish offices.
items.desc_zh: 重返办公室的要求和远程工作的减少促使公司更加密切地关注其设立办公室所在地的生活质量。

items.title_en: These are America’s 10 worst states to live in for 2026
items.title_zh: 2026 年美国最不适宜居住的 10 个州
items.desc_en: Some states may have low costs and light regulation, but high crime and lack of healthcare are among important factors when people choose where to live.
items.desc_zh: 一些州的成本可能较低，监管也较宽松，但高犯罪率和缺乏医疗保健是人们选择居住地点的重要因素。

items.title_en: Ferrari has recovered from its Luce-unveil slump. Why the stock is still underappreciated
items.title_zh: 法拉利已经从卢斯揭幕战的低迷中恢复过来。为什么股票仍然被低估
items.desc_en: Ferrari shares are up 17% since falling after unveiling its panned Luce model. Two banks still see more potential in the stock.
items.desc_zh: 法拉利股价自推出饱受批评的 Luce 车型后下跌以来，已上涨 17%。两家银行仍看到该股的更大潜力。

items.title_en: US pays out $3m to victims of mysterious Havana Syndrome
items.title_zh: 美国向神秘哈瓦那综合症受害者支付300万美元
items.desc_en: US officials and diplomats and their families began reporting a mysterious illness a decade ago.
items.desc_zh: 美国官员、外交官及其家人十年前开始报告一种神秘疾病。

items.title_en: 'Funflation' hits home: Why staying in isn't the cost-saver it used to be
items.title_zh: “Funflation”击中要害：为什么呆在家里并不能像以前那样节省成本
items.desc_en: Following a wave of price hikes, at-home pastimes like streaming movies or playing video games are pinching pocketbooks.
items.desc_zh: 随着一波价格上涨，流媒体电影或玩视频游戏等家庭消遣活动正在挤压钱包。

items.title_en: Indian tourists among 15 killed as speedboat capsizes in Vietnam
items.title_zh: 越南快艇倾覆 15名印度游客遇难
items.desc_en: Local media say 21 people were saved after the boat overturned in rough seas near an island in south Vietnam.
items.desc_zh: 当地媒体称，这艘船在越南南部一座岛屿附近的波涛汹涌的海面上倾覆，共有 21 人获救。

items.title_en: China braced for second typhoon in a week as Bavi approaches landfall
items.title_zh: 巴威即将登陆，中国做好一周内第二次台风的准备
items.desc_en: Hundreds of thousands of people are evacuated from eastern Zhejiang province, with the city of Wenzhou close to the path of the storm.
items.desc_zh: 浙江省东部数十万人被疏散，温州市靠近风暴路径。

items.title_en: Burnout, frustration and heartbreak: Amazon layoffs take their toll in saturated job market
items.title_zh: 倦怠、沮丧和心碎：亚马逊裁员对饱和的就业市场造成影响
items.desc_en: In the eight-plus months since Amazon announced its most expansive job cuts ever, laid off workers have been thrust into an increasingly saturated labor market.
items.desc_zh: 自亚马逊宣布有史以来最大规模的裁员以来的八个多月里，下岗工人被推入日益饱和的劳动力市场。

items.title_en: A tiny GLP-1 implant is the latest bet to help patients maintain their weight loss
items.title_zh: 微型 GLP-1 植入物是帮助患者维持减肥效果的最新选择
items.desc_en: Vivani Medical is developing an implant of semaglutide, the active ingredient in Novo Nordisk's obesity injection Wegovy and diabetes counterpart Ozempic.
items.desc_zh: Vivani Medical 正在开发索马鲁肽植入物，索马鲁肽是诺和诺德肥胖注射剂 Wegovy 和糖尿病注射剂 Ozempic 中的活性成分。

items.title_en: Multiple New York Times reporters issued subpoenas over Air Force One reporting
items.title_zh: 多名《纽约时报》记者就空军一号的报道发出传票
items.desc_en: The Trump administration issued subpoenas to several journalists after its report on security concerns involving the new Air Force One, according to the paper.
items.desc_zh: 据该报报道，特朗普政府在报告涉及新空军一号的安全问题后向几名记者发出了传票。

items.title_zh: 特朗普威胁称，如果伊朗试图杀死他，他将“摧毁”伊朗，因为财政部制裁伊朗金融家
items.desc_en: Trump says 1,000 missiles are "locked and loaded" and will hit Iran if it carries out its threats to assassinate the U.S. president.
items.desc_zh: 特朗普表示，1000枚导弹已“锁定并装弹”，如果伊朗兑现暗杀美国总统的威胁，这些导弹将袭击伊朗。

items.title_en: AstraZeneca's trial flop raises a bigger question: Is its pipeline premium becoming more vulnerable?
items.title_zh: 阿斯利康的试验失败引发了一个更大的问题：其管道溢价是否变得更加脆弱？

items.desc_zh: 该国总理在该国独立日称这次坠机事件是一场悲剧。

items.title_en: Spain battles to contain one of its deadliest wildfires as at least 12 killed
items.title_zh: 西班牙正在努力遏制最致命的野火之一，造成至少 12 人死亡
items.desc_en: At least four Britons are believed to be among the victims of the blaze, which left another 23 people missing.
items.desc_zh: 据信至少有 4 名英国人在火灾中遇难，另有 23 人失踪。

items.title_en: Meta pulls new AI image feature after days of backlash
items.title_zh: 经过几天的强烈反对后，Meta 取消了新的人工智能图像功能
items.desc_en: Meta's release this week of an AI feature that let people alter Instagram content drew swift blowback.
items.desc_zh: Meta 本周发布了一项人工智能功能，可以让人们改变 Instagram 内容，但很快就引起了反弹。

items.title_en: Is the Assassin's Creed Black Flag remake worth the 13 year wait?
items.title_zh: 《刺客信条：黑旗》重制版值得 13 年的等待吗？
items.desc_en: The BBC's Tom Gerken plays the much-anticipated pirate game which has been remade from the ground up.
items.desc_zh: BBC 的汤姆·格肯 (Tom Gerken) 扮演了这款备受期待的海盗游戏，该游戏已从头开始重制。

items.title_en: Apple sues OpenAI, its employees claiming theft of trade secrets
items.title_zh: 苹果起诉 OpenAI，其员工声称窃取商业机密
items.desc_en: Apple said in a Friday lawsuit that OpenAI’s nascent hardware business is “rotten to its core.”
items.desc_zh: 苹果在周五的诉讼中表示，OpenAI 新兴的硬件业务“已经烂到了核心”。

items.title_en: Apple sues OpenAI alleging trade secret theft, says scheme was 'at every level'
items.title_zh: 苹果起诉 OpenAI 指控其商业秘密盗窃，称该计划“涉及各个层面”
items.desc_en: The two companies entered into a high-profile partnership in 2024 when ChatGPT was integrated into the iPhone's operating system.
items.desc_zh: 2024 年，当 ChatGPT 集成到 iPhone 操作系统中时，两家公司高调建立了合作伙伴关系。

items.title_en: New dinosaur species with neck as long as cricket pitch discovered in Thailand
items.title_zh: 泰国发现新恐龙物种，脖子与板球场一样长
items.desc_en: The plant-eating dinosaur, named Uragasaurus kalasinensis, is thought to have lived about 150 million years ago.
items.desc_zh: 这种食草恐龙被称为卡拉辛乌拉嘎龙 (Uragasaurus kalasinensis)，被认为生活在大约 1.5 亿年前。

items.desc_zh: 您的组织发生变化。访问保持不变。

items.title_en: EU threatens Meta with fines over 'addictive' Facebook and Instagram
items.title_zh: 欧盟因 Facebook 和 Instagram 上瘾而对 Meta 进行罚款威胁
items.desc_en: Regulators say features such as infinite scroll contribute to "compulsive use" and "unhealthy habits".
items.desc_zh: 监管机构表示，无限滚动等功能会导致“强迫性使用”和“不健康的习惯”。

items.title_en: Big tech must deal with scam ads under Ofcom proposals
items.title_zh: 根据 Ofcom 的提议，大型科技公司必须处理诈骗广告
items.desc_en: Ofcom says more than half of UK adults have encountered potentially fraudulent ads online.
items.desc_zh: Ofcom 表示，超过一半的英国成年人在网上遇到过潜在的欺诈性广告。

items.title_en: 'Cool in 90 seconds' - the fake portable air conditioners sweeping the internet
items.title_zh: “90秒制冷”——假冒移动空调席卷网络
items.desc_en: The ASA says adverts claiming small devices can rapidly cool rooms were too good to be true.
items.desc_zh: ASA 表示，声称小型设备可以快速冷却房间的广告好得令人难以置信。

items.desc_zh: Ofcom 对大量网站进行了罚款，称其未能阻止儿童访问其成人内容。

items.title_zh: 微软在“重大重组”中裁员 4,800 人并缩小 Xbox 规模
items.desc_en: The sweeping layoffs equate to 2.1% of Microsoft's workforce, with 1,600 immediate job losses at Xbox.
items.desc_zh: 这次大规模裁员相当于微软员工总数的 2.1%，Xbox 立即失业 1,600 人。

items.title_zh: 家长警告不要公开分享儿童图像，以免存在人工智能滥用风险
items.desc_en: The NCA says there is a growing threat of children's images being used to create child abuse material.
items.desc_zh: NCA 表示，儿童图像被用来制作虐待儿童材料的威胁越来越大。
